prediction.reasoning: Based on GOOGL's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annually (roughly 1.5-2% weekly standard deviation) and considering typical short-term price movements for large-cap tech stocks. Confidence intervals are calculated using normal distribution assumptions with estimated weekly volatility of ~1.7%, expanding symmetrically around the point estimate for each confidence level.
